name: Ventia Services Group Limited
description: Ventia Services Group Limited is a leading essential infrastructure services provider operating across Australia and New Zealand. The company specializes in the long-term operation, maintenance, and management of critical public and private infrastructure assets. Their diverse service portfolio spans sectors including defense, social infrastructure, transport, telecommunications, and utilities. By focusing on innovative solutions and sustainable practices, Ventia ensures that vital infrastructure remains safe, reliable, and efficient for the communities they serve, playing a crucial role in supporting the ongoing functionality and development of essential services throughout the region.
